title: Create: Source of experience
description: Source of experience textures for some items
body:
# The resource pack is abandoned, if you want to help, I will be glad.
Replaces the textures of some items from the Create mod with textures similar to the experience source!



![Source of experience textures ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/usXGjlP0/images/f18e35e58b719ac76ade9c3a4d83c1ecb3f9a26e.png)




```
We would like to thank Andrei Dziadok for providing the textures.
```


If you would like to share your feedback or help with the textures, we would be happy to hear from you at leha7cool.error@gmail.com!
